Headline: Temporary Westbound Reroute near 76th/Pulaski
ShortDescription: Westbound #67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted via 71st, Pulaski, 76th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted via 71st, Pulaski, 76th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #54 Cicero and #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute near Chicago/Laramie
ShortDescription: 54 Cicero and 66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near Chicago/Laramie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#54 Cicero and #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near Chicago/Laramie.

Southbound #54 Cicero buses will operate via Cicero, Augusta, Laramie, Washington, Cicero and over normal route.

Westbound #66 Chicago buses will operate via Chicago, Cicero, Augusta, Laramie, Chicago and over normal route.


Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute near Harrison/Racine
ShortDescription: 60 Blue Island/26th buses temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Harrison/Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#60 Blue Island/26th buses temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Harrison/Racine.

Westbound buses will operate via Harrison, Morgan, Van Buren, Racine and over normal route.

Eastbound buses will operate via Racine, Jackson, Morgan, Harrison and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Loop-bound Brown Line Service Delayed at Rockwell
ShortDescription: Loop-bound Brown Line trains are standing at Rockwell due to a mechanical problem.  Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop-bound Brown Line trains are standing at Rockwell due to a mechanical problem. 

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:
#81 Lawrence
#78 Montrose

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
